name: io.github.joepangallo/mcp-audit-server
description: MCP server interface for AI agent and MCP security auditing — config analysis, prompt injection testing, tool probing, data flow tracing

environmentVariables.description: API key for the managed hosted audit backend
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_SECURITY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional HTTPS API origin for self-hosted or private deployments
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_SECURITY_BASE_URL
